title: StrongerMobInRain&Thunder
description: Equip stronger equipment for some hostiles when the weather in overworld is raining or thundering
body:
**Credit: MADE WITH MCREATOR**

## This project has many bugs in the alpha-0.0.2 version, recommend to use beta-0.0.1

**Gamerule Allow/Prevent sleeping (also deleted old Ombrophobia mod) in raining or thundering was an bugs (althought it is set to false, you still can able to sleep) in alpha-0.0.2, I will fix it right on next version**

**This description for alpha-0.0.2 (some won't match because bugs and complicated code elements):**

## **Equipment Support** :

Notice : May be Equipment in Thunder Storm can be interspersed with equipment in Rain

**Mod is in development and can have bugs/issues**

### Armor (for zombies + zombie villagers + Husk + Skeletons + Strays)
- In Rain
>   Iron (10% for diamond) Chestplate _(Enchanted Protection II)_

- In Thunder
> Diamond (10% for netherite) Chestplate, Leggings, Helmet, Boots _(Enchanted Protection IV)_

### Zombies + Zombie Villagers + Husks
- In Rain

>   Iron Sword (10% for diamond) _(Enchanted Sharpness II)_

- In Thunder

> Diamond Sword (10% for netherite) _(Enchanted Sharpness III, Fire Aspect I)_


Totem of Undying/Fireball/Wither Skull/Snowball/Shovel/Cobweb/Spider Eye (both raining and thundering)

### Skeletons + Strays
- In Rain
> Bow _(Enchanted Punch II, Power I)_

- In Thunder
> Bow _(Enchanted Punch IV, Power V, Flame II)_

### Crepper : In Thunder, Creeper has chances for being charged

### Vindicator : with an enchanted diamond axe (Sharpness)

### Pillager : with an enchanted crossbow (Unbreaking, Multishoot, Piercing)

## **Effect** :
- Effects can include for hostiles (except not supported hostile and creeper):
> Regeneration

> Stregth

> Speed

> Fire Resistance

> Slow Falling

> Jump Boost

Some with higher level in thunder storm

## Mechanic Changes (just happen when the thundering or raining weather):

- Husk have chances for spawning with killer bunny

- Chances for thundering has been increased - 50% when it rains **(This may be a bug - 100% for thundering)**

- When hostile select target to attack, it will thrown Fireball/Snowball/Wither skull (depend on its item in off hand and 75 times for throwing). If a mob named Crazy Man and hold Fireball/Snowball/Wither skull, it can throw infinity, no limited. **Note: Throwing Projectile for buffed mobs in testing can be error**

- Depending on the item in hostile's off hand, if they hurt entities, entities will receive Slowness/Mining Fatigue/Poison effect

- If the buffed mob kill by Iron Golem, there will be 5 zombie spawned

- If the player stands on top of 3 blocks that buffed mob can't reach (and hurts them), a skeleton will spawn for each hurt.

## Gamerule Option:

### Get Bonus Loot from Buffed Mob (bonusMobLoot):

When Player kill buffed Mob, Player can receive extra loot (just support a few mobs)

Default value: true

### Bonus Experience when buffed mob dies (bonusExperience): 

Drop More Experience if the player kills the buffed mob (Choose your amount =))

Default value: 7

### **Gear Drop** (seem like this has bug) : default = false
